cardDescription.es: Track que forma parte del recopilatorio X aniversario del sello discografico KMT Records. Un track que fusiona lo organico con el groove mas electronico dentro del puro sonido Böje
cardDescription.en: Track that is part of the 10th anniversary compilation of the record label KMT Records. A track that fuses organic elements with a more electronic groove, within the pure Böje sound.
